comment.body: i mentioned yesterday about how the levels seemed off (i.e. price seemed to move and pause on very diff spots) and something was awry. (again, not blaming anyone - I have no expectations that anything is right 100% of the time). Could be nothing and a temporary blip, but things under the hood have been quizzical. Banks haven't been tracking yields, SOFR rates going up over Fed RRP rates. There's stress out there.
